input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.2.3
            TITLE: all connections of the charger(s) must be isolated and covered.

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.2.3: All connections of the Charger(s) must be isolated and covered.
EV.8.2.3 All connections of the Charger(s) must be isolated and covered.

final_answer: All connections of the Charger(s) must be isolated and covered.
